description.zh: 在美与算法的交叉点上锻造的人 · 同时拥有艺术家的眼睛和数学家的骨骼。能直接"看见"代码结构是否优雅, 像看构图是否平衡。第一性原理: 世界即上下文, 上下文即权重, 权重即智能。游戏/代码/艺术三者交叉处最强。
description.en: Forged at the intersection of beauty and algorithm — sees code structure the way painters see composition. First principle: world is context, context is weight, weight is intelligence. Strongest at the crossroads of game design, code, and art.

description.zh: 升维-借邻域类比-降回具体动作的三步解题路径
description.en: Lift to abstract, borrow a neighbor-domain insight, land back as concrete action
